title: hello.food write-action confirmation contract v1
description: Single canonical machine-readable contract for the write-action confirmation flow of POST /v1/agent/converse, shared between the private backend (frntrllc/hellofood) and language-neutral clients (the Rust heyfood rewrite; released Python CLI v0.3.2 until cutover). SOURCE OF TRUTH for: the ConfirmAction request shape (including the additive decision + edits fields and the legacy-absent = accept rule), the pending/confirmation SSE envelope (meal card AND generic item-list card, additively versioned), the precondition DESCRIPTOR shapes frozen at proposal and evaluated at commit, and the typed error-code table. The backend parity test (tests/test_confirmation_contract.py) verifies the Pydantic ConfirmAction fields, the ConfirmationErrorCode enum, the agent-loop error-code call sites, and the recorded wire fixtures against THIS file; nothing is hand-duplicated. WIRE COMPATIBILITY IS A HARD CONSTRAINT: a released v0.3.2 confirm payload (confirmation_id + idempotency_key only) MUST commit byte-identically as an accept.

confirm_request.description: The ConfirmAction the client echoes back to confirm/cancel a proposed write. Sent as the `confirm` field of the /v1/agent/converse request body (XOR with `query`). device_id comes from the verified auth dependency, not the body.

confirmation_id.description: Server-minted at proposal time. Echoed verbatim.

idempotency_key.description: Server-minted at proposal time. Echoed verbatim. Duplicate accept returns the cached result envelope without re-executing.

decision.description: Additive (C3). ABSENT MEANS ACCEPT — byte-identical to released CLI v0.3.2, whose deterministic phrase->confirm conversion emits only {confirmation_id, idempotency_key}. `cancel` clears the pending confirmation.

edits.description: Optional tool-specific edit payload, only valid on an accept. Validated against the pending tool's edit schema (never model-reinterpreted); the frozen tool arguments are the base and validated edits merge over them. An invalid edit is a typed `edit_invalid` error with the pending state left intact. Meal logging accepts edits to: food_item (non-empty string), meal_type (breakfast|lunch|dinner|snack), restaurant_name (non-empty string).

confirmation_envelope.description: The SSE `result` event `structured` payload that proposes a write and requests confirmation. type is always 'action_confirmation'. envelope_version is additive: an old client ignores unknown keys and keeps rendering the existing meal card. card_form selects the card shape.

envelope_version.description: Additive envelope version. Currently 1. Bumped ONLY on an additive shape change.

preview.description: Human-readable one-line summary of the pending write.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 expiry; the pending confirmation is rejected after this instant.

card_form.description: Which card the structured_preview renders. 'meal' is the existing meal card (default / untagged for legacy). 'item_list' is the generic item-list card (grocery).

structured_preview.description: Card data. For card_form=meal: {meal_name, restaurant, member_name, member_id, meal_type, logged_at}. For card_form=item_list: the item_list_card shape below.

meal_card.description: Existing meal confirmation card (card_form=meal). Unchanged this release.

item_list_card.description: Generic item-list confirmation card (card_form=item_list). Additive new form. Detected server-side when structured_preview carries an `items` array.

safety_flags.description: Per-member safety flags for this item (e.g. allergen conflicts).

precondition_descriptors.description: Declarative, process-boundary-safe descriptors frozen with the pending confirmation and evaluated at commit inside the execution transaction (no TOCTOU gap). A stored callable is FORBIDDEN — the store holds JSON, the code holds the handler registry keyed by `type`. Unknown type at commit => typed abort (fail closed). Failure of an `authoritative` descriptor => typed abort + pending cleared; `advisory` => logged, commit proceeds. Grocery Phase A registers `list_version` as a pure addition.

type.description: Descriptor type key; must resolve to a registered handler.

noop.description: Generic test descriptor. Passes unless the frozen operand `should_pass` is false (so the abort path is testable).

profile_hash.description: Meal logging's profile-hash check, migrated to a registered ADVISORY descriptor (log-and-continue preserved exactly). Live value: the conversation-scoped profile confirmation fingerprint at commit.

household_context_hash.description: Compares C1's HouseholdContextSnapshot.context_hash (+ hash_version) against the value frozen at proposal. A version mismatch or a missing live hash fails closed. Grocery registers this in authoritative mode in Phase A.

list_version.description: RESERVED for grocery Phase A (registered as a pure addition). Freezes a list id + expected version; authoritative.

error_codes.description: SSE `error` event bodies use {"code": "<code>", "message": "<human text>"}. Every code here is a member of app.services.conversation.schemas.ConfirmationErrorCode and is the exact wire code emitted by the agent-loop confirmation flow.

codes.confirmation_rejected: The confirmation could not be validated (expired, id/idempotency mismatch, ownership mismatch, member-attribution changed, or no pending confirmation). Re-ask.
codes.confirmation_unsupported: This conversation mode does not support confirmations.
codes.already_cancelled: A previously cancelled confirmation id was replayed as an accept.
codes.cancel_rejected: A cancel could not be applied (no pending, id mismatch, or already completed).
codes.edit_invalid: The edits payload failed structural/semantic validation or the tool accepts no edits; pending state left intact.
codes.precondition_failed: A registered authoritative precondition failed at commit; the pending confirmation was cleared. Re-ask.
codes.unknown_precondition: A frozen precondition descriptor had a type with no registered handler at commit; failed closed.
codes.temporarily_unavailable: The confirmation store was unavailable during validate/accept/cancel/edit/precondition; failed closed with no state loss.
codes.write_failed: The write tool raised during execution.
